name: click-rename-split-opt
description: Rename click.parser.split_opt -> split_option across 3 files (8 call sites + 2 imports)
task_md:
# Rename `click.parser.split_opt` to `split_option` across the package

The internal helper `split_opt(opt)` in `src/click/parser.py` has been
renamed to `split_option(opt)` (the def line is already updated). All
call sites and imports in the rest of the `src/click/` package still
reference the old name `split_opt` and will fail with `NameError` /
`ImportError` until updated.

**Task**: rename every remaining `split_opt` reference inside
`src/click/` so that the package imports cleanly and the verify
command passes.

**Where to look** (you must find all of them):
- `src/click/parser.py` itself - 2 internal call sites still use the
  old name.
- `src/click/formatting.py` - 1 import + 1 call site.
- `src/click/core.py` - 1 import + multiple call sites.

Do not modify any file under `tests/`. Do not change the function's
signature or behaviour - this is purely a rename. The new name
`split_option` is final; do not revert to `split_opt`.

Verify with the configured verify command (runs a focused subset of
the click test suite that exercises the option-parsing path which
routes through `split_option`).
